args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 following the end of your Halcyon contract.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued against ORD-3320 and customer notified at accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: The deletion schedule for Fernwood Ltd's data has been confirmed; all datasets will be deleted 30 days after export, on 2026-08-16.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd's Halcyon offboarding is complete: access revoked, pro-rata refund issued, and deletion schedule confirmed.
